content.text:
<plugin_info kind="matched_installed">
display_name: Neon Postgres
description: Manage your Neon projects and databases with the neon-postgres agent skill and the Neon MCP Server
mcp_servers:
  - neon
</plugin_info>
<user_query>
When we merge into `master` we need to refresh the data in the neon `staging` db
with production.
</user_query>

I'll trace how merges to `master` are handled today and whether Neon `staging` refresh is already wired in CI.

[REDACTED]

input.search_term: neondatabase github action reset branch from parent restore staging
input.explanation: Find the official Neon GitHub action or API to refresh a branch from its parent on merge.

content.text:
Adding a Neon reset step to the master deploy workflow: reset `staging` from `prod`, then run migrations before deploying.

[REDACTED]

input.old_string:
- name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Biome check
input.new_string:
- name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Refresh Neon staging from production
        id: neon-staging
        uses: neondatabase/reset-branch-action@v1
        with:
          project_id: ${{ vars.NEON_PROJECT_ID }}
          branch: staging
          parent: true
          api_key: ${{ secrets.NEON_API_KEY }}
      - name: Run database migrations on staging
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ steps.neon-staging.outputs.db_url }}
        run: pnpm --filter api run db:migrate
      - name: Biome check

input.old_string: Configure these GitHub **secrets** and **variables** before enabling previews:
input.new_string:
Pushes to `master` run [`.github/workflows/deploy.yml`](.github/workflows/deploy.yml): the Neon `staging` branch is reset from `prod`, migrations run on staging, then `web-staging` and `api-staging` deploy. Production deploy is manual (`workflow_dispatch` only).

Configure these GitHub **secrets** and **variables** before enabling previews:

input.old_string:
deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: staging
    env:
      CI: true
      WRANGLER_ENV: staging
      CLOUDFLARE_ENV: staging
      CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
      CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.20.0
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 25.3.0
          cache: pnpm
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Biome check
input.new_string:
deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: staging
    env:
      CI: true
      WRANGLER_ENV: staging
      CLOUDFLARE_ENV: staging
      CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
      CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.20.0
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 25.3.0
          cache: pnpm
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Refresh Neon staging from production
        id: neon-staging
        uses: neondatabase/reset-branch-action@v1
        with:
          project_id: ${{ vars.NEON_PROJECT_ID }}
          branch: staging
          parent: true
          api_key: ${{ secrets.NEON_API_KEY }}
      - name: Run database migrations on staging
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ steps.neon-staging.outputs.db_url }}
        run: pnpm --filter api run db:migrate
      - name: Biome check

content.text:
Implemented Neon staging refresh on every push to `master`, matching `DECISION_RECORD.md`.

### What runs on `master` merge

In [`.github/workflows/deploy.yml`](.github/workflows/deploy.yml), the **Deploy staging** job now:

1. **Resets** the Neon `staging` branch from its parent (`prod`) via [`neondatabase/reset-branch-action@v1`](https://github.com/neondatabase/reset-branch-action) with `parent: true`
2. **Runs migrations** on the refreshed staging DB (same pattern as PR previews)
3. **Deploys** `web-staging` and `api-staging` as before

```42:53:.github/workflows/deploy.yml
      - name: Refresh Neon staging from production
        id: neon-staging
        uses: neondatabase/reset-branch-action@v1
        with:
          project_id: ${{ vars.NEON_PROJECT_ID }}
          branch: staging
          parent: true
          api_key: ${{ secrets.NEON_API_KEY }}
      - name: Run database migrations on staging
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ steps.neon-staging.outputs.db_url }}
        run: pnpm --filter api run db:migrate
```

Uses the same `NEON_PROJECT_ID` variable and `NEON_API_KEY` secret as preview workflows.

### Notes

- **Reset wipes** local changes on `staging`; that matches “refresh from production.”
- **Migrations after reset** apply schema from the merged `master` branch on top of prod data (useful when prod hasn’t been deployed yet).
- **`DATABASE_URL` on Workers** is unchanged — reset keeps the same branch endpoint; only data/schema are refreshed.
- **Open PR preview branches** (`preview/*`, parent `staging`) are not auto-refreshed; they pick up the new staging parent on the next PR sync or when recreated.

README now documents this master → staging flow. Production deploy stays manual-only.

[REDACTED]

- Push after creating the commit.
- Do not include unrelated files in the commit.
<user_query>
Execute the selected diff-tab commit-and-push action.
</user_query>

input.command:
cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-one && git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml README.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
ci(deploy): refresh Neon staging from prod on master merge

Reset the staging branch from prod and run migrations before staging Workers deploy.
EOF
)" && git status
input.description: Stage workflow files, commit, verify status
